summary: Comprehensive testing of POS multi-price system with margin calculations. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed: (1) Admin product table shows all required columns, (2) Product form auto-calculates prices from cost and margins, (3) MRG001 product correctly shows price1=$15, price2=$13, price3=$12 based on cost=10 and margins 50%/30%/20%, (4) POS has 4 price mode buttons (价格1/价格2/价格3(整箱)/Bs.), (5) Price switching updates product displays correctly, (6) Bs. mode converts price1 using exchange rate (40.5), (7) Cart currency badge correctly shows 'USD' for price modes and 'Bs.' for bs mode.
passed_tests: POST /api/products - create product with cost_price=10, margin1=50, margin2=30, margin3=20 → price1=15, price2=13, price3=12 ✓
PUT /api/products/{id} - update product margins → prices recalculate correctly ✓
Verify existing MRG001 product has correct calculated prices ✓
Admin product table columns: 编码, 商品名称, 成本价, 利率1%, 价格1, 利率2%, 价格2, 利率3%, 价格3(整箱) ✓
Admin product form shows auto-calculation: cost × (1 + margin%) display ✓
POS has 4 price mode buttons: 价格1, 价格2, 价格3(整箱), Bs. ✓
POS Bs. mode - MRG001 shows Bs.607.50 (15 × 40.5) ✓
Cart currency badge shows 'USD' for price1/2/3 modes ✓
Cart currency badge shows 'Bs.' for bs mode ✓

features_verified.admin_product_form: Working - Auto-calculates prices when entering cost and margins
features_verified.pos_price_mode_buttons: Working - 4 buttons: 价格1/价格2/价格3(整箱)/Bs.
features_verified.pos_price_switching: Working - Product prices update when switching modes
features_verified.bs_currency_conversion: Working - Uses exchange rate (usd_to_ves) from settings
features_verified.cart_currency_badge: Working - Shows USD/Bs. based on selected price mode

seed_data_creation: Product MRG001 exists with cost=10, margin1=50%, margin2=30%, margin3=20%, resulting in price1=$15, price2=$13, price3=$12
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-price system fully tested and working. MRG001 is the test product for margin calculations. Exchange rate is 40.5 (usd_to_ves). POS price modes are 'price1', 'price2', 'price3', 'bs'. Old products have 0% margins but fallback to legacy prices (retail_price, wholesale_price).
